name: Repositories

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Repositories is complete and correct

scope: Implement the individual domain repositories and services that have no cross-repository dependencies. This covers: DaemonRepository (smallest, validates the pattern), GitService + Provider interface (wraps git binary), Identity extraction (namespace detection, projects directory), ConfigRepository (tier-based config merge), PromptRepository (tier-based prompt resolution), and RenderContext methods on NodeState/Task/AuditState. Steps 3-7 and 9 from the migration path. Internal ordering: DaemonRepo, GitService, and Identity are independent of tierfs-dependent repos; ConfigRepo and PromptRepo depend on tierfs; render methods are independent of all repositories.
success_criteria: All six components implemented: DaemonRepository, git.Service + Provider, Identity, ConfigRepository, PromptRepository, and RenderContext methods
Each repository follows the spec's constructor patterns (NewXxx(wolfcastleRoot) and NewXxxWithTiers(tiers) where applicable)
Error messages follow the repository:operation:detail pattern (e.g. 'config: loading base tier: ...')
testutil.Environment is updated with fields for each new repository as it is built

breadcrumbs.text: Created 3 children: independent-repositories (orchestrator: DaemonRepo, GitService, Identity), tier-based-repositories (orchestrator: ConfigRepo, PromptRepo), render-context-methods (leaf: 4 tasks for AuditState/NodeState/Task render methods). Ordering: independent-repositories and tier-based-repositories can proceed in parallel; render-context-methods is fully independent of both. Within tier-based-repositories, both repos depend on tierfs (already complete) but not on each other.

Remediated render-context-methods: created render-context-documentation leaf with 4 tasks to address 3 audit gaps (2 missing ADRs for RenderContext design decisions, 1 missing rendering contract spec). Code is correct and tested; only documentation is missing. New leaf must complete before render-context-methods audit can pass.

Remediated render-context-methods: unblocked audit task. All three documentation gaps (ADR for parameterless Task.RenderContext, ADR for phantom taskID parameter, RenderContext rendering contract spec) were fixed in prior commits. Audit task reset to not_started for re-evaluation.
Final audit: all 10 child nodes complete with passing audits, zero open gaps, zero escalations. Full build/vet/test suite passes across 26 packages. Repositories subtree is complete.

audit.result_summary: Implemented six domain repositories across three orchestrator branches. Independent repositories: DaemonRepository (PID/stop-file/log-dir operations, 6 tests), git.Service (Provider interface wrapping system git, 7 test functions against real repos), and Identity (namespace resolution and OS detection, 6 tests). Tier-based repositories: ConfigRepository (three-tier deep-merge config resolution, 9 tests) and PromptRepository (three-tier prompt/fragment resolution with template execution, 14 tests), both backed by tierfs.Resolver and wired into testutil.Environment. Render-context methods: AuditState, NodeState, and Task each received RenderContext methods (32 tests), with Task refactored to parameterless and NodeState retaining a phantom taskID for future ContextBuilder consolidation. Three ADRs and one spec document the non-obvious design decisions. All 26 packages build, vet, and test clean.
